since_last: 72% of 89 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +3.73%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 72% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.70% · BTC -0.06% · Gold -1.10% · Nasdaq100 +1.26%. 72% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +3.73%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +3.73%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -2.22%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: HON is the standout at -48.54%
cards.body: Leaders: AMAT +10.59%, KLAC +8.62%, PANW +8.04%, LRCX +7.39%, CRWD +6.56%. Laggards: HON -48.54%, MU -4.51%, SOUN -2.73%, INTC -2.67%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.43% at $156.96
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.43% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
